chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, KARACHI HCA No.195 of 2020 ___________________________________________________________ Date Order with signature of Judge ___________________________________________________________ For hearing of CMA No.830/2025. 12.08.2025. Appellant in person. Mr. Khurram Rasheed, Advocate for Respondent No.4. Mr. Kafeel Abbasi, AAG, Sindh along with Raza Mian, DSP (Legal-II) CPO. ________________ This High Court Appeal was disposed of vide order dated 04.05.2023 with consent when a sum of Rs.50,000/- (Rupees Fifty Thousand Only) was ordered to be paid to the appellant. He is present and says that sum has been paid to him. However, he has filed listed application seeking further order for respondent to pay more money on the ground that he is a poor person. This application is apparently not maintainable and is accordingly dismissed. J U D G E J U D G E Nasir/
